title: astragalus micranthus
intro: Astragalus micranthus is a species of legume native to China, belonging to the genus Astragalus, commonly known as milkvetch. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The health benefits of Astragalus micranthus include reducing fatigue, improving respiratory function, and enhancing overall well-being. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, often combined with other herbs to create a synergistic effect.
